title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 387.137 - Household goods transportation in intrastate commerce, commission to establish consumer protection requirements
text:
387.137.  Household goods transportation in intrastate commerce, commission to establish consumer protection requirements. — The state highways and transportation commission shall establish consumer protection requirements for motor carriers transporting household goods in intrastate commerce and establish a system for filing, logging, and responding to consumer complaints.
(L. 2012 H.B. 1402 merged with S.B. 470)
